query:
-- Get all distinct product types and a sample of product names per type
SELECT 
  productType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(productName) as sampleName1,
  MAX(productName) as sampleName2
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swli
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swli.uploadId = swu.id
WHERE swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
GROUP BY productType
ORDER BY count DESC;
